burden.dalyPerCapita: high in advanced disease; right heart failure burden
burden.mortalityRate: Moderate to high in advanced cases

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography screening; confirm with right heart catheterization and hemodynamic criteria

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with specialized PH centers

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Right heart catheterization and PH centers widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Etiology-driven care; PAH-specific therapy per ESC/ERS guidelines
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High resource use and complex multimorbidity
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Specialized PH centers and broad access to advanced therapies
